textByHash.862315704800995273520f55df63fb621ecc9008: I guess. It's a bit weird though.
textByHash.50e34a5c19596ed51e756894152abe8494da1906: There's nothing to do in this city. Might be time to give the theatre a visit.
textByHash.6c7a5c0a6903488b19d6d1c6e1efabac2e854c64: Indeed it is. I'd recommend going yourself if you haven't been before.
textByHash.42dc4a39ea9f72d7f43fd211e9daad2b24030f5b: Well rumour is that there's some plans for a new tithing project. Apparently, they're going to put the humans in boxes and drain their blood over time to be collected in batches.
textByHash.85d6b94d3d3d7008c2b1275c81d2bcb7212dbadd: I hear they're calling it the Tithe Farm.
textByHash.abdf9fca926bd05fa3712863cca78aa061875e6d: Ah, the one that runs it must also be a vyre of culture.
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
